title: Survey responses, APR, and numerous updates

texts: Added some more info to the survey announcement and a page with partial results.
Added APR notice and schedule page.
Added many passives and statuses in the clash and damage computations on Identity skills. More information can be found on the survey details page.
Added advanced options to the Identities/E.G.Os selector menu used in editing builds or setting black/whitelists across the site.
Added a link to the encounters and team builds sections when displaying builds for that encounter to go straight to a new build with the tag already in place.
Removed the overall identity and E.G.O columns in the Days Since table in the Timers and Roadmap page since they're redundant.

Changed the Edit Profile page to automatically strip extra spaces at the start/end of usernames. The excess spaces could cause problems with some people not being able to load their profile pages. If you still have this issue, try updating your username.
Moved the manual save button on the Company page from beside the filter option to the top center below the intro. Also reduced the autosave timer from 5s to 3s.
Increased the minimum width of skills and passives on the individual Identities page to prevent them from being too aggressively squished.
Greyed out marked achievements in the MD achievements tracker.
Added links to directly create a new build/md plan/collection to the sidebar.
Fixed an issue with HP computation using floor instead of round causing some identities to show up as having 1 less HP than they should.
Fixed a crash when checking Index Nursefather Yi Sang's Uptie 3 details due to a missing item in his damage calculation data.
